stages.concept:
# Unit 126: 관계대명사 who vs. 의문사 who - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사 who**와 **의문사 who**의 차이에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **관계대명사 who** — 앞의 명사(선행사)를 꾸며주는 역할

> I know the girl **who** won the prize.
> 나는 상을 탄 소녀를 안다. (the girl을 꾸며줌)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문사 who** — '누구'라는 질문

> **Who** won the prize?
> 누가 상을 탔니?

> I don't know **who** won the prize.
> 나는 누가 상을 탔는지 모른다. (간접 의문문)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 구별 방법: **선행사가 있으면** 관계대명사, **없으면** 의문사!

> I met the man **who** helped me. → 선행사(the man) ✅ → 관계대명사
> I wonder **who** helped me. → 선행사 ❌ → 의문사

> Do you know the teacher **who** teaches English? → 관계대명사
> Do you know **who** teaches English? → 의문사

**Q. 다음 중 밑줄 친 who의 쓰임이 나머지 둘과 '다른' 것을 고르세요.**
1. Check <u>who</u> is at the door. (문자 그대로 '누구가' 문 앞에 있는지)
2. The boy <u>who</u> is singing is Tom. (노래하고 있는 소년)
3. She is the girl <u>who</u> found my bag. (내 가방을 찾아준 소녀) ✅ 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 2번과 3번은 앞에 '소녀', '소년'이라는 꾸밈을 받는 대상(선행사)이 있어서 '~하는'으로 해석되는 **관계대명사** who이고,
1번은 앞에 선행사가 없으며 '누구'라고 해석되는 **의문사** who랍니다! 정답은 1번이에요.

**Q. 다시 고르면?**
1. Check <u>who</u> is at the door. ✅ (의문사)
2. The boy <u>who</u> is singing is Tom. (관계대명사)
3. She is the girl <u>who</u> found my bag. (관계대명사)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 선행사가 있으면 관계대명사, 없으면 의문사! 간단한 구별법이네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 126: 관계대명사 who vs. 의문사 who - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
I don't know who my teacher is. (     )
> **정답** 의문사

---

**02.** The girl who won the prize is my friend. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**03.** Who is that man? ?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**04.** I met a boy who can speak French. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**05.** Do you know who she is? ?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 who의 역할을 고르시오.
The man who helped me was kind.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**07.** I wonder who broke the window.
> **정답** 의문사

---

**08.** She is the person who called you.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**09.** Who wants some cake?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**10.** The student who studies hard will pass.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나를 도와준 사람은 친절했다.
The person helped me was kind.
> **정답** who (관계대명사)

---

**12.** 그가 누구인지 아니?
Do you know he is?
> **정답** who (의문사)

---

**13.** 노래를 잘하는 소녀는 인기가 있다.
The girl sings well is popular.
> **정답** who (관계대명사)

---

**14.** 누가 이 편지를 보냈는지 모르겠다.
I don't know sent this letter.
> **정답** who (의문사)

---

**15.** 영어를 가르치는 선생님은 재미있다.
The teacher teaches English is fun.
> **정답** who (관계대명사)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나를 도와준 남자는 친절했다. (관계대명사)
The man who me helped was kind
> **정답** The / man / who / helped / me / was / kind

---

**17.** 누가 전화했는지 아니? (의문사)
Do know you who called
> **정답** Do / you / know / who / called

---

**18.** 축구를 좋아하는 소년은 내 친구이다. (관계대명사)
The boy who soccer likes is my friend
> **정답** The / boy / who / likes / soccer / is / my / friend

---

**19.** 그녀가 누구인지 궁금하다. (의문사)
wonder I who she is
> **정답** I / wonder / who / she / is

---

**20.** 나에게 편지를 보낸 사람은 그녀이다. (관계대명사)
The person who me sent a letter is her
> **정답** The / person / who / sent / me / a / letter / is / her
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 126: 관계대명사 who vs. 의문사 who - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: ____________________ is that girl standing under
the tree?
B: She is my friend ______________ goes to the same
school as me.
which
who
whom
what
> **정답** who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The cat _______________ name I don't know is
Tom's.
Tom will give the cat to Amy ____________ already
has two cats.
whose - who
who - who
that - whose
which - who
> **정답** whose - who

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy has no idea _________________ the man is.
But, he keeps saying he was her teacher
_______________ taught her 10 years ago.
what - who
who - who
that - who
who - which
> **정답** who - who

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
He pointed out who will be the next manager.
Everyone was wondering who wrote the letter
to Amy.
Amy is talking to the boy who is about her
age.
Tom knows who likes Amy in his class.
Who do you think is Amy?
• point out 지적하다, 가리키다
> **정답** Amy is talking to the boy who is about her age.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I knew the girl who my brother liked.
The girl who gave a speech at the graduation
ceremony was impressive.
Do you know anyone who can speak both
Korean and English?
Tom is a doctor who lives right next to the
hospital.
Mom asked who did the dishes after the meal.
> **정답** Mom asked who did the dishes after the meal.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 Amy의 옆집에 누가 사는지 모른다.
I don't know who Amy is.
I don't know what lives next door to Amy.
I don't know who lives next door to Amy.
I don't know Amy who lives next door.
> **정답** I don't know who lives next door to Amy.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 그에게 책을 준 그 소년을 찾고 있었다.
Tom was looking for who gave him a book.
Tom was looking for the boy who gave him a
book.
Tom was looking for the boy whom gave
him a book.
Tom want to know who gave him a book.
> **정답** Tom was looking for the boy who gave him a book.

---

**08.** 다음 중 who의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I know who she is.
Tom saw a man who was shoplifting.
Please tell me who can solve the problem.
I know who helped the man.
> **정답** Tom saw a man who was shoplifting.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I couldn't remember who I saw then.
She doesn't know whom wrote the letter.
I don't know who came to class.
He who has many friends is not lonely.
> **정답** She doesn't know whom wrote the letter.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I am not sure who called me the other day.
Tom saw a girl who was wearing a long skirt.
She has a friend who she met at the church.
They didn't recognize who I was.
There was a woman who was talking on the
phone.
• the other day 몇일전에
> **정답** They didn't recognize who I was.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The man who I had never met before yelled at
me.
Did you see who just went inside the building?
Amy still doesn't know who sent her the
letter.
Please tell me who took my new umbrella.
Tom's father who drives me to school is very
kind.
> **정답** Tom's father who drives me to school is very kind.

---

**12.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① Tom was on ② the phone with ③ Amy who ④
he likes. ⑤ 없음
> **정답** 3

---

**13.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① I told ② the police who broke into ③ the house ④
then. ⑤ 없음
> **정답** 5

---

**14.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
①l asked ②mom who ③she met ④in the morning.
⑤ 없음
> **정답** 5

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(관계대명사 who 사용)
Amy knew who the woman is
very talkative.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who the woman → the woman who

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Can you see who is that?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is that? → that is

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Did you find out whom stole
your ring?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** whom → who

---

**18.** 다음 중 관계대명사로 쓰인 who에 해당하는 것의 번호를
모두 고르시오. (3개)
I have a lot of friends ①who I can play with. But I am
not sure ②who are my close friends among them.
Tom ③who is kind lives too far from me, so we don't
meet often. Amy ④who lives near has nothing in
common with me.
> **정답** 1, 3, 4

---

**19.** 다음 중 의문사로 쓰인 who에 해당하는 것의 번호를 모두
고르시오. (3개)
The teacher asked ①who wanted to talk about their
career after school. The students ②who are having
trouble deciding their future jobs all wanted to see
the teacher. They needed to decide ③who should go
first and ④who should go last. The teacher said
anyone ⑤who has more time should come last.
> **정답** 1, 3, 4

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 골라 고쳐
쓰시오. [2개]
Anyone is who interested in learning
yoga can join our weekly yoga class. Yoga is for
people who feel tired all the time. And,
who wants to relax mind and body? Then
the answer might be yoga. If you know someone
whom want to start yoga, please tell them
to join our yoga class.
> **정답** who is, who feel, who wants, who wants
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 126 관계대명사 who vs. 의문사 who중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 숲에 사는 몇몇 사람들을 안다.
힌트 (     ) live, in the forest
I know some people  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 who, live, in, the, forest

---

**02.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 누가 내 샌드위치를 먹었는지 모르겠다.
힌트 (     ) eat, my sandwich
I don't know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 who, ate, my, sandwich

---

**03.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 누가 1등을 했는지 알고 있니?
힌트 (     ) win, the first prize
Do you know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 who, won, the, first, prize

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
전화를 받은 여자는 공손했다.
힌트 (     ) the, phone, answered, who
The woman  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was
polite.
정답 who, answered, the, phone

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
내가 어젯밤에 만난 그 남자는 재미있었다.
힌트 (     ) met, who, I, last, night
The man  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was
funny.
정답 who, I, met, last, night

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 다시 완성하시오.
나는 약속 시간에 늦는 사람을 좋아하지 않는다.
I don't like people who is late for appointments.
→ I don't like people
.
정답 who are late for appointments

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 다시 완성하시오.
그는 TV에 나오는 배우처럼 생겼다.
He looks like an actor which appear on TV.
→ He looks like an actor
.
정답 who appears on TV

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 관계대명사 who를 이용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
Sally was mad at his brother.
His brother used her laptop.
Sally was mad at  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 his, brother, who, used, her, laptop

---

**09.** 주어진 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
Who is that girl?
→ I don't know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 who, that, girl, is

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 주어진 말과 관계대명사 who를 이용하여
영어로 쓰시오.
내가 만났던 그 여자는 요리사였다.
힌트 (     ) meet, a cook
The woman  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 who, I, met, was, a, cook

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 126: 관계대명사 who vs. 의문사 who - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: ____________________ is that boy sitting on the bench?
B: He is my friend ______________ goes to the same class as me. which who whom what
> 정답: who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The dog _______________ owner I don't know is Amy's.
Amy will give the dog to Tom ____________ already has three pets.
whose - who who - who that - whose which - who
> 정답: whose - who

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom has no idea _________________ the woman is.
But, she keeps saying she was his neighbor _______________ lived near him 5 years ago.
what - who who - who that - who who - which
> 정답: who - who

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
He found out who will be the next captain.
Everyone was wondering who sent the gift to Amy.
Tom is talking to the girl who is in his class.
Sarah knows who likes science in her group.
Who do you think is Kevin?
> 정답: Tom is talking to the girl who is in his class.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I knew the boy who my sister liked.
The girl who gave a presentation at the assembly was confident.
Do you know anyone who can play both piano and guitar?
Amy is a volunteer who helps at the library.
Dad asked who cleaned the kitchen after dinner.
> 정답: Dad asked who cleaned the kitchen after dinner.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 Tom의 옆자리에 누가 앉는지 모른다.
I don't know who Tom is.
I don't know what sits next to Tom.
I don't know who sits next to Tom.
I don't know Tom who sits next to.
> 정답: I don't know who sits next to Tom.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 그녀에게 편지를 쓴 그 소년을 찾고 있었다.
Amy was looking for who wrote her a letter.
Amy was looking for the boy who wrote her a letter.
Amy was looking for the boy whom wrote her a letter.
Amy want to know who wrote her a letter.
> 정답: Amy was looking for the boy who wrote her a letter.

---

**08.** 다음 중 who의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I know who he is.
Amy saw a woman who was jogging.
Please tell me who can solve the puzzle.
I know who helped the girl.
> 정답: Amy saw a woman who was jogging.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I couldn't remember who I met then.
She doesn't know whom wrote the email.
I don't know who came to the meeting.
He who has many books is not bored.
> 정답: She doesn't know whom wrote the email.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I am not sure who texted me yesterday.
Tom saw a boy who was wearing a cap.
She has a cousin who she met at the park.
They didn't recognize who I was.
There was a man who was reading a newspaper.
> 정답: They didn't recognize who I was.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>의 who와 그 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The girl who I had never met before smiled at me.
Did you see who just left the classroom?
Amy still doesn't know who gave her the flowers.
Please tell me who took my new pencil case.
Tom's sister who drives us to school is very cheerful.
> 정답: Tom's sister who drives us to school is very cheerful.

---

**12.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① Tom was on ② the phone with ③ Amy who ④ he likes. ⑤ 없음
> 정답: 3

---

**13.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
① I told ② the teacher who broke into ③ the classroom ④ then. ⑤ 없음
> 정답: 5

---

**14.** 다음 문장에서 선행사를 고르시오.
①I asked ②dad who ③he met ④at the office. ⑤ 없음
> 정답: 5

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. (관계대명사 who 사용) Amy  knew  who  the  boy  is very  athletic. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: who the woman → the woman who

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Can  you  tell  who  is  that? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: is that? → that is

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Did  you  find  out  whom  broke your  pen? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: whom → who

**18.** 다음 중 관계대명사로 쓰인 who에 해당하는 것의 번호를 모두 고르시오.
(3개) I have a lot of classmates ①who I can study with.
But I am not sure ②who are my close friends among them.
Tom ③who is generous lives too far from me, so we don't meet often.
Amy ④who lives nearby has nothing in common with me.
> 정답: 1, 3, 4

---

**19.** 다음 중 의문사로 쓰인 who에 해당하는 것의 번호를 모두 고르시오.
(3개) The coach asked ①who wanted to talk about their training after school.
The athletes ②who are having trouble with their skills all wanted to see the coach.
They needed to decide ③who should go first and ④who should go last.
The coach said anyone ⑤who has more free time should come last.
> 정답: 1, 3, 4

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Anyone is who interested in learning painting can join our weekly art class.
Painting is for people who feel stressed all the time.
And, who wants to express creativity?
Then the answer might be painting.
If you know someone whom want to start painting, please tell them to join our art class.
> 정답: who is, who feel, who wants, who wants
